message:
fix(http/h1/client): reject whitespace in chunked size to match strict codec

ClientIncomingBody::try_decode_chunked_frame used .trim() on the
chunk-size field, accepting leading/trailing whitespace that the
strict codec parser (parse_chunk_size_line) rejects. This parsing
inconsistency is a request smuggling vector when different parties
(proxy, origin) use different parsers.

Fixed to match codec.rs: no trim, explicit whitespace rejection.
All 24 H1 client tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
